name: eduka
description: Eduka landing frontend and backend service for eduka.uz

scripts.start: node backend/migrate.js || echo "Eduka migration warning: server will start anyway"; node backend/server.js
scripts.build: node --check backend/server.js && node --check backend/migrate.js && node --check backend/telegram-bot.js && node --check backend/set-telegram-webhook.js && node --check backend/seed.js && node --check frontend/crm-services.js && node --check frontend/app.js && node --check frontend/ceo-login.js && node --check frontend/ceo-console.js && node --check frontend/student-app.js && node --check frontend/gamification-pro.js && node --check frontend/eduka-production-core.js && node --check frontend/eduka-real-crud.js && node --check backend/routes/students.routes.js && node --check backend/routes/groups.routes.js && node --check backend/routes/teachers.routes.js && node --check backend/routes/payments.routes.js && node --check backend/routes/attendance.routes.js && node --check backend/routes/reports.routes.js && node --check backend/routes/settings.routes.js && node --check backend/routes/super-admin.routes.js && node --check backend/services/payment.service.js && node --check backend/services/receipt.service.js && node --check backend/services/telegram.service.js && node --check backend/services/report.service.js && node --check backend/middleware/auth.middleware.js && node --check backend/middleware/permission.middleware.js && node --check backend/middleware/tenant.middleware.js && node --check backend/db/pool.js && node --check backend/reset-owner-only.js
